summary: This is a compact QA camera mount with a flat base, a vertical riser, and clear access for fasteners. I’ve kept the geometry simple and parameter-driven so you can hand-tune hole placement, edge margins, and any camera interface later without fighting the model.
fit_checks: Fastener access stays clear by reserving a broad central clearance volume around the riser area. That should keep tool access sane instead of creating the usual tiny cave of regret.
hole positions against your actual hardware pattern, because “close enough” is how mounts become decorations
riser offset relative to camera centerline, since the current stub assumes a simple
export_detail: Exported CadQuery mount assets as STL, STEP, and 3MF, then assembled a slicer pack for creality-k2-pro-combo using the fit-check-fast profile.
